title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Trade Proposals on Nuclear Restrictions
summary_full: Iran said it could suspend uranium enrichment for up to five years but the Trump administration insisted on 20 years, officials from both countries said.
summary_public: Iran said it could suspend uranium enrichment for up to five years but the Trump administration insisted on 20 years, officials from both countries said.
